title: hackelia diffusa var. coerulescens
intro: Hackelia diffusa var. coerulescens, also known as blue stickseed, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as relieving symptoms of anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and supporting digestive health. Blue stickseed can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can also be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
